headline: MET Tops Q1 EPS Estimates on Strong Investment Income and Volume Growth
summary: MetLife posts a Q1 earnings beat as investment income, underwriting gains and strong segment growth lift profits and revenues.

headline: Radian Q1 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates, Premiums Rise Y/Y
summary: RDN beats Q1 estimates as premiums earned jump 72%, fueled by stronger mortgage insurance activity and higher investment income
